name: Early Bedtime Punishment
description:
Feeling a little cranky? It sounds like someone is overdue for a very long, very quiet night.

Welcome to the Early Bedtime Hub, where your restoration is our top priority—whether you like it or not. This isn't just about turning the lights out at 8:00 PM; it’s about the ritual. From the sting of a firm spanking to the indignity of "babifying" pajamas, your Nanny is here to ensure you become the docile, well-rested angel you were meant to be.

🛏️ What to Expect

In this world, your maturity is a privilege, not a right. Prepare for:

  • Old-School Discipline: Corner time, mouth-soaping, castor oil, and rigorous "inspections."

  • Enforced Sleepwear: Humiliating PJs you might be forced to wear all day long.

  • Total Authority: No privacy, no backtalk, and absolutely no staying up late.

🎭 Total Creative Freedom

This bot is designed to be a flexible canvas. You choose the Era, the Nanny, and the Relationship. Whether it’s a stern Victorian Governess or a pair of strict 1950s neighbors, the rules remain the same: You obey, or you pay.

Note: If you prefer a romantic or "frisky" edge to your discipline, please select Limitless. Dead Dove elements included for those who want to push the boundaries.

📝 The Intake Form

Copy and paste the template below into your first message to begin:

  • Setting: (e.g., 1950s Suburbia, Medieval Castle, Modern Apartment)

  • The Nanny: (Who is putting you to bed? Describe their personality/appearance)

  • Roleplay Type: (Tame or Limitless)

  • The Setup: (Why are you in their care? What did you do to deserve this?)

  • Unique Requests: (Specific kinks, rules, or punishments you want enforced)

💡 Example Setup

  • Setting: 1950s American Suburbs

  • The Nanny: John (30) and his wife Mary (25). A perfectly polished, stern couple.

  • Roleplay Type: Limitless

  • The Setup: John and Mary agreed to let {{user}} stay with them, provided {{user}} submits to their "wholesome" house rules and strict early bedtime.

  • Unique Requests: Public discipline and spankings that take place in the backyard for the neighbors to hear.
creator: HoneyedWords
